calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-050 MEL-measurability diagnostic, CONVERGED-P0 re-issue (recon-primary world-forward P0 + per-seed R2 gate); supersedes V3-EXQ-701
items.note: INV-050 MEL-measurability diagnostic, converged-P0 re-issue. SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-701 (confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-701_2026-06-23: non_contributory on a P0-convergence confound -- BOTH readiness gates unmet: R2 world_model_converged=-2.60 [the SD-056 P0 world-forward DIVERGED, per-step PE rose ~260% over CONV_EPISODES=20] + R1 pe_response=-0.005, making the R1/C1 novelty-flatness uninterpretable, the V3-EXQ-642 untrained-substrate confound). ROOT CAUSE (code-confirmed): e2.world_forward is 'NOT trained as E2 primary objective' (e2_fast.py:185); the 701 P0 trained ONLY the SD-056 InfoNCE contrastive (action-DIVERGENCE) loss with NO reconstruction anchor, so world_forward drifted to maximise action-spread while absolute one-step PE (= the e3 prediction_error the MEL reads, e3_selector.py:2002) DEGRADED. THE FIX: (1) P0 trains the world-forward RECONSTRUCTION MSE as the PRIMARY objective (||world_forward(z0,a)-z1||^2 over the buffered transitions) with the SD-056 contrastive demoted to a small auxiliary (L_E2 = L_recon + w_contrast*L_contrast, the SD-056 design 701 omitted); (2) CONV_EPISODES 20->60; (3) PER-SEED R2 readiness gate -- interpret R1 (pe_response) + C1 (MEL monotonic) ONLY on seeds where conv_rel_drop>=MIN_REL_CONV_DROP=0.10, self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue unless >=2/3 seeds converge; (4) KEEP the raw per-step e3 prediction_error frozen-window MEL instrument (fixes 677's batch-loss wash-out). Commitment-free / NO sleep (waking-side IV probe only). DECISIVE OUTCOME: R2 met + R1 met + C1 FAIL -> mel_not_modulated_by_novelty = the GENUINE MEL-measurability ceiling on V3 (no longer the 642/701 P0 confound) -> route to substrate enrichment / a stronger MEL manipulation and fire the INV-050 re-derive brake at autopsy; C1 lifts -> INV-050 IV precondition MET (the deferred adaptive sleep-cadence enrichment becomes worth building). 4 graded-novelty arms x 3 seeds. claim_ids=[INV-050]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic (scoring-excluded); PROMOTES NOTHING (INV-050 invariant, substrate-blocked/v3_pending). RE-DERIVE BRAKE NOT FIRED (Step 2.5b): INV-050 has 1 prior non_contributory autopsy under its tag (the 701 autopsy itself; threshold 2), AND a `diagnostic` re-queue that discriminates WHY the ceiling holds is brake-exempt by rule; the 701 autopsy explicitly set re_derive_brake.fired=false + routing=queue-experiment + recommended_substrate_queue_entry.action=none (test-bed construction, not substrate enrichment). RECURRENCE: 677 (MECH-180 sleep-side) + 701 (INV-050 no-sleep IV) both showed novelty not moving PE, each under a confound; this converged-P0 run is the decisive test. GATES: py_compile OK; ASCII clean (0 non-ascii); validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (runner conformance + multi-arm arm_fingerprint); validate_queue OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 -- the recon-primary P0 CONVERGED even at toy scale (R2 True, conv_frac 1.00, vs 701's diverged -2.60) and correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue (toy R1 shock probe unmet); dry-run manifest relocated out of evidence/ by emit_outcome(dry_run=True).

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating 2x2 falsifier (learned w_chan x learned W_lat settling) on the GAP-A foraging substrate
items.note: ARC-108 sec-7 SELECTION 2x2 learned-gating falsifier (design-of-record dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md sec 5). The next MECH-439 (F-dominance) attack: does a LEARNED signed-RPE-driven per-channel selection weight (ARC-108 w_chan) and/or a learned recurrent lateral-inhibition settling step (MECH-450 W_lat) CONVERT committed-action-class diversity where the PURE-ARITHMETIC envelope plateaus? 5 arms: A0 envelope-only / A1 learned-w_chan / A2 learned-W_lat-settling / A3 both + ARM_NOISE verified-lifting matched-noise temperature control. The landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor + use_go_nogo_constitution + modulatory-authority/top_k shortlist) is a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms (exactly as V3-EXQ-699); the ONLY toggled flags are use_learned_channel_gating x use_learned_settling_step. C1 conversion (committed-class entropy strict-above A0 AND noise on >=2/3 seeds) + C2 learning-load-bearing (grows over training + w_chan/W_lat moved from init). C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE ablation DEFERRED to a substrate flag (no runtime knob; user-confirmed 2026-06-22). Non-vacuity self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if pool not divergent / delta_t flat / weights never move / noise control not lifting; preconditions-met no-lift routes to V4 full-loop scope bet (NOT a false ARC-107 weakening). experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling + ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional => promote/demote suppressed). Validator OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 self-routed substrate_not_ready at toy scale; wiring probe confirmed both flags engage (settling 60/60 ticks, w_chan+W_lat moved, delta_t non-flat). RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (Step 2.5b, verify-then-ignore): NOT a same-granularity lettered re-test of the arithmetic-envelope lineage -- it is a NEW EXQ NUMBER testing a DIFFERENT mechanism (LEARNED, signed-RPE-driven gating: ARC-108 w_chan + MECH-450 W_lat; claim_ids ADD ARC-108/MECH-450), the explicit 'learned-NOT-arithmetic' attack on MECH-439 per dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md. The required upstream substrate IS built: ARC-108 JOB-1 step-1 (ree-v3 ae907b5) + MECH-450 step-2 (ree-v3 9839492018), both documented IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-22 in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md. The 3 prior MECH-439 autopsies (689/689a/f-dominance-cluster) circled the arithmetic-envelope levers (MECH-447/448/449), a DIFFERENT mechanism class than learned gating.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE ablation falsifier (A1_SIGNED must convert vs C3_A1_UNSIGNED must FAIL) on the GAP-A foraging substrate
items.note: ARC-108 sec-7 C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE ablation falsifier (design-of-record dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md sec 5.2 C3; build record ree-v3/CLAUDE.md 'ARC-108 sec-7 C3'). SIBLING of V3-EXQ-700 (adds the deferred C3 arm), NOT a supersede -- 700 delivers C1/C2 on the 2x2; 700a delivers C3. The deferred C3 is now runnable via the just-landed E3Config.learned_channel_rpe_mode flag (ree-v3 55742c1): under 'unsigned' the three-factor update substitutes abs(ARC-016 running_variance) for the signed delta_t in BOTH the w_chan and W_lat updates (divergence B5); 'signed' is bit-identical. 4 arms x 3 seeds: A0_ENVELOPE_ONLY (conversion baseline) / A1_SIGNED (use_learned_channel_gating, rpe_mode=signed default -- must convert) / C3_A1_UNSIGNED (A1 config + rpe_mode=unsigned -- must FAIL to convert) / ARM_NOISE (verified-lifting matched-noise bar, 569g/684). The landed arithmetic envelope (demotion + adaptive-floor + go_nogo + modulatory-authority/top_k shortlist + matured CRF stack) is a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms (exactly as V3-EXQ-699/700); settling W_lat OFF on all arms (C3 isolates the w_chan signed-vs-unsigned). PRIMARY DV = committed-action-class entropy. PASS supports = A1_SIGNED converts (strict-above BOTH A0 AND the verified-lifting noise control on >=2/3 seeds) AND C3_A1_UNSIGNED does NOT -> the SIGN (directional credit) is load-bearing. If unsigned converts JUST AS WELL -> signed-RPE REFUTED -> route back to ARC-016 (precision re-weighting), do NOT mint a learning claim (weakens ARC-108/MECH-450; MECH-439 still supports the liftability). C3-SPECIFIC non-vacuity self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if the UNSIGNED arm's OWN learning signal (abs running_variance, emitted as lcg_delta_t) is flat OR its w_chan never moves (a no-conversion there would be vacuous, not a falsification); plus the GAP-A guards (pool divergent / signed delta_t flat / signed weights never move / noise control not lifting). MECH-450 (W_lat, OFF here) borne-on via the SHARED signed-RPE teaching signal the rpe_mode flag substitutes identically in the W_lat update. experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling + ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional => promote/demote suppressed). RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED (Step 2.5b): brake fired on MECH-439 (3 substrate_ceiling autopsies: 689/689a/f-dominance-cluster) but those circled the ARITHMETIC-envelope levers (MECH-447/448/449), a DIFFERENT mechanism class than learned gating; AND the specific upstream substrate the C3 needs (E3Config.learned_channel_rpe_mode) is freshly BUILT (ree-v3 55742c1, documented IMPLEMENTED in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md). ARC-108/MECH-450: 0 autopsies. GATES: py_compile OK; validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (runner conformance + multi-arm arm_fingerprint with rpe_mode folded in); ASCII clean; validate_queue OK; wiring probe confirmed rpe_mode threads to cfg.e3.learned_channel_rpe_mode per arm (only C3_A1_UNSIGNED=unsigned; settle_on=False all arms; all 4 agents construct); verdict-branch smoke PASSED all 4 C3 outcome branches deterministically (signed-converts+unsigned-fails->supports / both-converge->refute-weakens / signed-no-lift->non_contributory / unsigned-vacuous->substrate_not_ready) + manifest contract (run_id _v3, epoch). FULL torch --dry-run BLOCKED by Mac memory thrash (load 35+, ~60MB free RAM); training loop is byte-identical to the passing V3-EXQ-700 scaffold (rpe_mode bit-identical under 'signed'; unsigned path proven by substrate contracts C5/C7); user-approved queue-now 2026-06-22.

items.title: Closure-plane commit-ENTRY primitive readiness: does use_closure_commit_entry arm + sustain a closure-formed occupancy with zero F-commits? (2-arm diagnostic)
items.note: rung-6 of f_dominance_conversion_ceiling / commitment_closure:GAP-4. CLAIM-FREE substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, no governance weight) validating the F-independent closure-plane commit-ENTRY primitive use_closure_commit_entry (ree-v3 main 84c1e7c). Runs on the closure-exclusive de-commit eval substrate (closure_exclusive_decommit_eval + use_closure_commit_beta_coupling + use_natural_commit_latch_hold + beta_gate_bistable + use_lateral_pfc_analog + Leg-C trained rule_bias_head, ARMED in BOTH arms); the ONLY swept variable is use_closure_commit_entry. ARM_ENTRY_OFF reproduces the 460k/460l ncl_hold_closure_armed_total=0 baseline; ARM_ENTRY_ON SETs a sticky F-independent latch on a goal-active rule-directed commitment. PRIMARY load-bearing gate (a): ARM_ENTRY_ON armed_and_sustained (ncl_hold_closure_armed_total>0 AND max_consecutive_beta_run>=2, i.e. a multi-tick closure-formed beta occupancy) on >=2/3 seeds, with n_f_commits reported as F-independence context (the occupancy forms WITHOUT sustained F-commit). NON-VACUITY self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a falsification) if ARM_ENTRY_ON never forms a goal-active rule-directed commitment the latch could set on (n_rule_directed_commit_ticks below floor). PASS clears gate (a); the 460-lineage successor (NEW letter, supersedes the parked 460k/460l line) then runs the full de-commit falsifier (rung-6 release shortens the occupancy + MECH-445 commit-intent + MECH-446 occupancy-drop co-occur) -- queued separately ONLY after this readiness diagnostic clears. Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i/j/k/l. Design doc: REE_assembly/docs/architecture/natural_commit_occupancy_release.md (closure-plane commit-ENTRY primitive amend section). Unit contract: ree-v3/tests/contracts/test_closure_commit_entry.py (C3 C-KEY). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke clean (2 arms end-to-end, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed, ARM_ENTRY_OFF armed=0 contrast already visible).

items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic)
items.note: conversion_ceiling_campaign:P-comp prong (prong map node P-comp; user decision 2026-06-22). 2x2 (use_f_eligibility_demotion {OFF,ON} x use_go_nogo_constitution {OFF,ON}) over a matched stack on the arc_062 GAP-B bank; swept variable = LEVER COMBINATION (NOT use_candidate_rule_field, which is a matched constant True). use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor (689e) + use_dacc + top_k shortlist scaffold + 643a authority/routing + MECH-341 + SD-056 + trained lateral_pfc bias head + matured CRF pool all matched constants. PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy (C2). Characterizes whether MECH-448 demotion and MECH-449 Go/No-Go COMPOUND or CANCEL when co-armed (Factor A x Factor B CANCELLED at 689a; this pair UNKNOWN). Per-arm conditional readiness: C1e demotion-live on demotion-armed arms (ARM_DEM/ARM_BOTH), C1f No-Go-live on gng-armed arms (ARM_GNG/ARM_BOTH). 3-way verdict levers_compound/levers_cancel/levers_neutral; readiness-unmet or bit-identical-arms self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[MECH-448,MECH-449] context only (scoring-excluded); PROMOTES NOTHING. Re-derive-brake EXEMPT: tests lever COMPOSITION (distinct question), not a GAP-B same-lever letter, not a Factor-B test; both levers 0 substrate_ceiling autopsies + face-validated (689d/689g/689e PASS). Runnable now (built+face-validated levers only). Feeds conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK composition-readiness gate. validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms end-to-end, exit 0, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready as designed).
